subcodes.first_line: O esteemed and noble one! The Sinai of Truth hath been illumined, the sacred Valley of Túr hath appeared, and the mysteries of God have been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سینور مکرم سینای حق پرنور شد وادی مقدس طور شد اسرار حق مشهور شد مطمورها
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @poems and quotation from poetry, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Mount Carmel
